settings.question: WHAT IS YOUR SHIPPING POLICY?
settings.answer: All orders are processed within 2-3 business days. Shipping times vary by location. We ship worldwide via tracked carriers.

settings.question: HOW CAN I TRACK MY ORDER?
settings.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. Use it on our Order Tracking page or the carrier's website.

settings.question: DO YOU ACCEPT RETURNS?
settings.answer: Due to the limited nature of our drops, all sales are final. Please refer to our sizing guide before purchasing.

settings.question: WHAT IF I RECEIVE A DEFECTIVE ITEM?
settings.answer: Contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the defect. We will assess and provide a replacement or store credit.

settings.question: HOW DO YOUR SIZES RUN?
settings.answer: Our pieces are designed with an oversized fit. We recommend sizing down for a more structured silhouette. Consult the size guide on each product page.
